description_long: This is a classic Volkswagen Type 2 minivan, featuring a two-tone paint scheme with a white upper body and blue lower body. The vehicle has a boxy, elongated shape with a flat front, large rectangular side windows, and a distinctive V-shaped front panel with a prominent VW emblem. The minivan is equipped with black wheels, chrome hubcaps, and small round side mirrors. The side panels display multiple windows, including a vented panel near the rear, and the rear features a simple tailgate with rectangular taillights and a license plate. The roof is slightly raised and smooth, with no visible roof rack, and the overall design is iconic of mid-20th-century microbuses. The minivan's doors, windows, and handles are clearly defined, suggesting functional entry points and interactive components.
description: A classic blue and white Volkswagen minivan with large rectangular windows, a flat front with VW emblem, and a smooth, raised roof.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue lower body, white roof, three large rectangular windows, and two doors on the right side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the V-shaped white and blue panel, large VW emblem, split windshield, and round headlights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar window and door configuration, vented panel near the rear, and black wheels.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the white roof, blue tailgate, rectangular taillights, and license plate.
attribute_window_configuration: Six large rectangular side windows per side, split front windshield, single rear window.
